DP.436.0000:
We needed the energy from the
Valley Windworks to make this...\f
It would take a scientific genius to
make something like this...\f
Therefore, our boss, who made this,
is a scientific genius!\f
DP.436.0001:
Graw! You were eavesdropping!
I was just thinking out loud!\f
You’re a persistent pest...
I’m getting tired of running away...\f
But I’m not going to waste my energy
knocking you around...\f
DP.436.0002:
There’s a fancy hotel in a fancy
place with a fancy restaurant.\f
The fancy restaurant’s filled with
fancy people who think of themselves\r
as being too fancy to battle alone.
DP.436.0003:
I’d rather be in a pool than the sea.\f
The salty tang of the sea tastes like
my tears after a hard day at work...
DP.436.0004:
There’s something on top of this
big cliff here!\f
My instincts tell me that, but how
am I supposed to climb up?
DP.436.0006:
Hotel Grand Lake
Another World on Lake Valor
DP.436.0007:
Dr. Footstep’s House
Footprints Reveal All
